Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 690}The hell you kids doin' out here this late?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 690}You delinquents keep loitering in the wrong places, gettin' up to god knows what.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 690}Whichever one of your gang wears the heavy clothes to cover his tattoos, tell him I got my eye on him.[n]{f 1 1}
